scope.summary: Operator-facing cloud-model access configuration surface: (a) CLI-bridge / subscription-plan auth-and-login status + config for the official-CLI providers the operator uses (Claude Code, GPT/Codex), and (b) a BYOK API-key entry (Anthropic, OpenAI) stored in the existing OS-keychain secrets vault for users who bring their own keys. Gemini is explicitly excluded (CLI deprecating).
scope.origin: Operator request 2026-07-02: there is no login screen or key-entry surface for cloud models. The operator personally does NOT use BYOK (they use Claude Code + GPT via subscription PLANS through the official CLI bridge), but BYOK MUST be AVAILABLE for other users. Do NOT add Gemini (its CLI is being discontinued). WP-KERNEL-004 already built the backends (model_runtime/cloud/openai_byok.rs, anthropic_byok.rs, official_cli_bridge.rs, cli_bridge_runtime.rs, secrets_vault.rs OS-keychain, consent_gate.rs); what is missing is the operator-facing configuration UI that reaches them.
forbidden_paths: unofficial consumer-web automation / cookie or OAuth-token scraping / browser control to impersonate an official client (reset brief 6.11; spec cloud constraints)
storing API keys in plaintext, logs, EventLedger, or any non-keychain store
acceptance_criteria: A native egui settings surface (in the existing Settings Swarm/Models section) lets the operator configure cloud model access. It is reachable from the operator settings and Argus-inspectable with stable author_id targets.

CLI-BRIDGE / PLAN path (operator's primary): the surface shows auth/login status for the official-CLI providers Claude Code and GPT/Codex (logged-in / not-logged-in / expired) and, where the provider's official path allows, guides or triggers the provider's own login. It uses the provider's subscription-plan auth via the official CLI bridge (official_cli_bridge.rs) and stores NO Handshake-held credential for this path. No unofficial automation.

BYOK path (available, not required): a per-provider API-key entry (Anthropic, OpenAI) that stores the key ONLY in the existing OS-keychain secrets vault (secrets_vault.rs / keyring); the key is never written to logs, Flight Recorder, EventLedger, or plaintext. The CloudLane/BYOK backend (openai_byok.rs / anthropic_byok.rs, MT-006 boundary) consumes the stored key. A negative test proves the key never appears in logs/FR/plaintext.
Gemini is NOT offered as a provider in the surface (CLI deprecating).
The configured/authed cloud lanes are enumerable so the MT-012 operator model-picker can list available cloud lanes; an un-authed / un-keyed provider shows as unavailable rather than erroring.

Same-change in-product UserManual coverage (how to log in via plan / enter a BYOK key / which providers are supported); HBR-INT-009 posture recorded; Flight Recorder/EventLedger evidence where the surface affects lane launch or consent.
Pre- and post-implementation adversarial review (incl. a secrets-leakage lens) before READY_FOR_VALIDATION; implementer does not self-certify COMPLETED.
proof_targets: TO_BE_FINALIZED_AT_ACTIVATION: exact Rust tests for (a) BYOK key stored only in the OS-keychain vault and NEVER in logs/FR/plaintext (negative/leak test), (b) CLI-bridge auth-status surfacing for Claude Code + GPT/Codex, (c) cloud-lane enumeration reflecting configured/authed providers (no Gemini), plus Argus proof of the settings surface. Proof commands MUST name exact tests and fail on zero matching tests.
scope.risk_if_missed: Operators (especially BYOK users) have no way to configure cloud model access; the CLI-bridge and BYOK backends WP-KERNEL-004 already built are unreachable from the operator surface, so cloud lanes cannot be used by anyone who is not already logged into a CLI out-of-band.

implementation_notes: Backends already exist (WP-KERNEL-004): model_runtime/cloud/{openai_byok.rs (MT-125), anthropic_byok.rs (MT-126), official_cli_bridge.rs + cli_bridge_runtime.rs (MT-127), secrets_vault.rs (MT-128 OS-keychain), consent_gate.rs}. This MT builds the operator-facing CONFIG surface + wiring, not new provider adapters.
Operator's primary path = subscription PLANS via official CLI bridge (Claude Code, GPT/Codex). BYOK is available for other users; the operator does not use it. Gemini is excluded (CLI deprecating).
Never store or log BYOK keys outside the OS-keychain secrets vault. CLI-bridge auth uses the provider's own login; do not persist provider credentials in Handshake.
Cloud usage must still pass the MT-006 CloudLane/BYOK ProjectionPlan + ConsentReceipt boundary; this surface configures access, it does not bypass consent/projection.
Feeds the MT-012 operator model-picker (enumerable authed cloud lanes) and consumes the MT-006 cloud backend.
Rust-only; Rust backend + native egui/Argus. Confirm/adjust scope (esp. how much CLI-login triggering is feasible per each provider's official path) before activation.

pre_implementation_review.full_review_ref: session task a0e9015f5c0ee8643 output (read-only adversarial, security-first, file:line evidence)
pre_implementation_review.base_is_solid: WP-KERNEL-004 backends verified good: OsKeychainSecretsVault (real keyring, os-keychain in DEFAULT features, no in-proc cache), redacted-Debug BYOK runtimes, env-scrubbed official CLI bridge (is_secret_bearing_env_name), consent gate, honest ProviderNotConfigured errors. Risks are in the NEW seams MT-015 adds.
blockers_and_decisions: HIGH ENUMERATION: keychain cannot enumerate (OsKeychainSecretsVault::list_lanes returns empty by design). DECISION: MT-015 defines a NON-SECRET 'configured providers' registry in the native settings store / Postgres (NEVER vault.list_lanes, NEVER SQLite); map ProviderNotConfigured -> 'unavailable' not error. MT-012 is PENDING, so soften AC to 'unit-tested enumeration API MT-012 will consume'; do not require proving the picker.

HIGH CLI AUTH-STATUS: no auth_status/whoami probe exists (register_bridge only checks executable exists); 'trigger login/detect expired' risks drifting into forbidden token/credential capture. DECISION: down-scope to 'configured / not-configured' + an operator-INITIATED launch of the provider's OWN official login command in a visible terminal (reconciled with HBR-QUIET-001, operator-initiated not background); live logged-in/expired detection best-effort/DEFERRED per provider; NEVER capture/store provider credentials.

HIGH LEAK TEST: #1 leak path is the NEW egui state - key must NEVER enter DialogState, the persisted egui snapshot, or the workspace-settings PUT. DECISION: leak/negative test stores a canary key and asserts absence from persisted DialogState/settings blob, workspace-settings PUT, tracing, Flight Recorder, EventLedger, cloud_invocations rows, and all Debug/Display; asserts wired vault is OsKeychainSecretsVault (not InMemory); asserts refuse-to-persist under --no-default-features; asserts egui buffer cleared post-submit. Key must still round-trip out of the vault.
MED CONSENT: DECISION: add AC + negative test that saving a key creates/approves NO ConsentReceipt or ConsentGate entry; first lane launch still hits MT-006 fail-closed.
MED DEP: MT-006 is READY_FOR_VALIDATION (proven 3/3 this session, validator_verdict PENDING). Accepted; MT-015 also re-proves the no-bypass fail-closed itself.
MED ZEROIZE: secrecy=0.10 declared but unused. DECISION: wrap the in-memory key String + egui buffer in secrecy::SecretString / zeroize; password-masked field.

LOW-MED GEMINI: CliKind::GeminiCli exists and brief 6.11 lists Gemini as valid, but operator forbids offering it. DECISION: explicit 'Gemini not offered' enumeration filter + test; record the 6.11 divergence so it is not 'restored' later.
LOW ROTATE: DECISION: add a key remove/rotate control reusing vault.delete (idempotent) so a leaked key can be rotated.

risks: A BYOK key could be logged, written to Flight Recorder/EventLedger, or persisted in plaintext.
The CLI-bridge login could drift into unofficial automation / token scraping.
The config surface could bypass the MT-006 consent/projection boundary.
minimum_controls: BYOK key stored ONLY in the OS-keychain vault; leak test proves absence from logs/FR/plaintext.
CLI-bridge auth uses only the provider's official path.
Cloud usage still requires ProjectionPlan + ConsentReceipt (MT-006).

research_basis.authority_posture: Master spec/SPEC_CURRENT/product code are authority; reset brief 6.11 (cloud constraints: official CLI bridge / BYOK only, no unofficial automation) is operator-vision context.
product_code_evidence: src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/cloud/openai_byok.rs / anthropic_byok.rs / official_cli_bridge.rs / cli_bridge_runtime.rs / secrets_vault.rs / consent_gate.rs (WP-KERNEL-004 backends)

handshake_compatibility.rust_only_implementation: Rust backend plus native egui/Argus only.
handshake_compatibility.spec_realism_gate: Implementer may move only to READY_FOR_VALIDATION after real proofs (incl. the secrets-leak negative test); COMPLETED is validator-only.
